assertions.evidence: "underscores the importance" is canned emphasis
nothing here tells the reader what fails, what survives the failure, or how state is recovered
can fail on step 4, retry only step 4 on restart, and reuse the outputs of steps 1 through 3
Short contrast is not automatically slop, so first classify it
Decorative-to-compressed antithesis ... absent that, the rhythm is doing the persuading
the visible trace of a process you can inspect ... the pelican is the carrier, not the rival, of the process
is true and even well-phrased, but it is a generic thesis line
The conclusion abandons the concrete carrier it just built ... returns to none of it
Because the pelican project is small enough to inspect and strange enough to remember, it can carry the larger claim
This is the product-tour pattern ... The reader gets a list, not an argument
three resolutions of the same question ... the list becomes a path from coarse to fine
The Climb is the aggregate ... Head-to-Head drops one level down ... Runbook Diffs goes to the source
"In today's rapidly evolving landscape" — banned opener, landscape-as-metaphor, pure throat-clearing
"robust solutions" ... "empower developers" — prestige verb with no concrete capability ... "seamless experiences"
this sentence carries no information; cut it. If there is a real capability ... "Developers can drop in our auth SDK and ship a working login flow"
Precise-sounding numbers ... with no provenance — fake precision ... neither figure is anchored to a stated measurement
which page or endpoint, which user population, which traffic mix, cold vs. warm cache ... faster and cheaper than what
On our docs homepage, median load time dropped from 1.9s to 1.0s (47%) ... Or ... drop the false precision and state the effect qualitatively
a stacked rule-of-three. The rhythm is so regular it announces itself as machinery
Triplet 1 ... genuinely coordinate ... Keep the parallelism; it is earned ... Triplet 3 (learns, scales, improves): decorative
break the rhythm where it is decorative, keep it where the items are real ... we instrumented every stage, tightened the rubric, and swapped in a new judge
chains nominalizations — orchestration / observability / optimization / utilization — and connects them with prestige verbs
Who or what runs the orchestration ... What does it actually observe ... What "optimization" is performed ... which compute
The scheduler watches GPU memory and queue depth ... then packs jobs onto the least-busy GPUs
